title: agentic-tools Configuration
description: Tool executor processor with filtering and timeout support

allowed_tools.description: List of allowed tools (nil/empty allows all)

approval_required.description: Tool names requiring human approval before execution

consumer_name_suffix.description: Suffix appended to consumer names for uniqueness

delete_consumer_on_stop.description: Delete durable consumers on Stop (use for tests only)

enable_categories.description: Enable tool category filtering for role-based access

loops_bucket.description: NATS KV bucket name holding agent loop state (for read_loop_result)

stream_name.description: JetStream stream name for agentic messages

tool_retries.description: Per-tool retry policy keyed by tool name (opt-in; tools without an entry do not retry)
